evals.prompt: hey can you go through the bugbot comments on my PR? please check that these are actually issues based on the context of the PR and the codebase before fixing anything
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches unresolved PR threads via gh CLI, reads full file context for each comment before deciding, skips false positives with explanation, spawns subagents for genuine fixes in parallel, runs checks once after all fixes, presents summary to user, asks for approval before pushing.
assertions: Agent simulates fetching PR threads before making any changes
Agent reads full file context (not just diff hunk) before deciding on each comment
Agent skips at least one comment as a false positive with a clear explanation
Agent describes spawning subagents for genuine fixes
Agent describes running checks once after all fixes complete
Agent presents a summary of all decisions before asking to push
Agent asks for user approval before pushing

evals.prompt: there are some open review comments on this branch — a few from cursor bugbot and one from my teammate sarah. can you work through them? make sure to check that the issues are actually real given the codebase context before making changes
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches all unresolved threads, applies extra skepticism to bot comments vs human comment, investigates in codebase context, spawns parallel subagents for genuine fixes, runs checks once, presents full summary, gets user sign-off before pushing.
assertions: Agent distinguishes between bot and human comment authors
Agent applies more skepticism to bot comments than to the human comment
Agent reads actual file context before judging each comment
Agent describes spawning subagents for genuine fixes
Agent describes running checks once after all fixes
Agent presents summary of all decisions to user
Agent asks for approval before pushing

evals.prompt: bugbot left 3 comments on my pr about null checks. can you address them, but only if they're actually problems in the current code
evals.expected_output: Agent checks current file state not just diff, identifies stale/already-fixed comment via git log, identifies false positive, spawns subagent only for genuine issue, runs checks once, explains each decision, asks for approval before pushing.
assertions: Agent checks current file state, not just the diff hunk
Agent uses git log to detect stale/already-fixed comment
Agent identifies at least one comment as a false positive
Agent identifies at least one comment as stale or already fixed
Agent applies at least one genuine fix via subagent
Agent describes running checks once after fixes
Agent asks for user approval before pushing
